Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-20-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Michael Heath, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Tirso Alcaraz, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Enrique Hernandez.
Default was entered against defendant on March 4, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 3, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Tirso Alcaraz, and against the Defaulted Defendant Enrique Hernandez as follows:

Damages/Principal - $24,500.00.
Costs - $385.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $24,885.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-06-2010 Off Calendar
